Short Description: Seasoned Ground Beef in a Thai Massaman Coconut Curry with Roasted Baby Potatoes and Charred Green Beans over Basmati Rice
Long Description: Seasoned ground beef slow simmered in a rich Thai massaman coconut curry of cinnamon, cardamom, star anise, and lemongrass, served with roasted baby potatoes and charred green beans over basmati rice for a warm, aromatic plate with a rich, spiced finish.

Short Description: Charred Chicken with a Peri Peri Glaze and Coconut Yogurt Drizzle with Fire Charred Sweet Corn and Roasted Cauliflower over Coconut Rice
Long Description: Charred chicken marinated in peri peri and finished with a spicy peri peri glaze and a cooling coconut yogurt drizzle, served with fire charred sweet corn and roasted cauliflower over coconut rice for a bold, Portuguese inspired plate with a bright, spiced finish.

Dish Name: Lemon Herb Chicken with Whipped Feta
Short Description: Pan Roasted Chicken Breast with a Whipped Lemon Garlic Feta and Charred Sweet Potato, Roasted Broccoli, House Pickled Vegetables, and Dried Cranberries
Long Description: Lemon and herb marinated pan roasted chicken breast finished with a bright herb oil, served over a whipped lemon garlic feta with charred sweet potato, roasted broccoli, house pickled vegetables, and dried cranberries for a clean, Mediterranean inspired plate with a fresh, citrus finish.

Short Description: Carne Asada Steak with a Creamy Peruvian Aji Verde and Roasted Sweet Plantains and Pickled Red Onions over Cilantro Lime Rice
Long Description: Citrus and garlic marinated flank steak chargrilled and sliced, finished with a creamy Peruvian aji verde of cilantro, huacatay, jalapeño, and lime, served with roasted sweet plantains and pickled red onions over cilantro lime rice for a bold, Latin inspired plate with a bright, herbaceous finish.

Short Description: Miso Glazed Cod with a White Miso Glaze and Roasted Baby Bok Choy and Roasted Kabocha Squash over Wild Rice
Long Description: Pan seared cod broiled with a sweet white miso glaze, served with roasted baby bok choy and oven roasted kabocha squash over wild rice for a clean, Japanese inspired plate with a savory, umami finish.

Short Description: Crispy Seared Tofu with a Gochujang Glaze and Charred Broccoli and Roasted Cremini Mushrooms over Basmati Rice
Long Description: Extra firm tofu seared crispy and finished with a sweet spicy gochujang glaze, served with charred broccoli and roasted cremini mushrooms over basmati rice for a bold, Korean inspired plate with a fiery, umami finish.

Short Description: Collagen rich chicken bone broth slow simmered 24 hours with fresh ginger and white miso
Long Description: Our signature high protein and collagen rich chicken bone broth slow simmered for 24 hours with fresh ginger and white miso.

Short Description: Mango chia pudding with coconut cream and fresh diced mango
Long Description: Creamy mango chia pudding layered with rich coconut cream and finished with fresh diced mango for a bright, tropical treat.
